namespace PolyType.SourceGenerator

    internal sealed partial class TypeShapeProvider_TestAssembly
    {
        /// <summary>Gets a generated shape for the specified type.</summary>
        #nullable disable annotations // Use nullable-oblivious property type
        public global::PolyType.ITypeShape<global::TestNamespace.EnumHolder> EnumHolder => __EnumHolder ?? __Init_Singleton(ref __EnumHolder, __Create_EnumHolder());
        #nullable enable annotations // Use nullable-oblivious property type
        private global::PolyType.ITypeShape<global::TestNamespace.EnumHolder>? __EnumHolder;

        private global::PolyType.ITypeShape<global::TestNamespace.EnumHolder> __Create_EnumHolder()
        {
            return new global::PolyType.SourceGenModel.SourceGenObjectTypeShape<global::TestNamespace.EnumHolder>
            {
                PropertiesFactory = __CreateProperties_EnumHolder,
                ConstructorFactory = __CreateConstructor_EnumHolder,
                Provider = this,
            };
        }

        private global::PolyType.Abstractions.IPropertyShape[] __CreateProperties_EnumHolder() => new global::PolyType.Abstractions.IPropertyShape[]
        {
            new global::PolyType.SourceGenModel.SourceGenPropertyShape<global::TestNamespace.EnumHolder, global::TestNamespace.MyEnum>
            {
                Position = 0,
                Name = "Value",
                DeclaringType = (global::PolyType.Abstractions.IObjectTypeShape<global::TestNamespace.EnumHolder>)EnumHolder,
                PropertyType = MyEnum,
                Getter = static (ref global::TestNamespace.EnumHolder obj) => obj.Value,
                Setter = static (ref global::TestNamespace.EnumHolder obj, global::TestNamespace.MyEnum value) => obj.Value = value,
                MemberInfoFactory = static () => typeof(global::TestNamespace.EnumHolder).GetProperty("Value", __BindingFlags_Instance_All, null, typeof(global::TestNamespace.MyEnum), global::System.Type.EmptyTypes, null),
                IsGetterPublic = true,
                IsSetterPublic = true,
                IsGetterNonNullable = true,
                IsSetterNonNullable = true,
            },
        };

        private global::PolyType.Abstractions.IConstructorShape __CreateConstructor_EnumHolder()
        {
            return new global::PolyType.SourceGenModel.SourceGenConstructorShape<global::TestNamespace.EnumHolder, global::PolyType.SourceGenModel.EmptyArgumentState>
            {
                DeclaringType = (global::PolyType.Abstractions.IObjectTypeShape<global::TestNamespace.EnumHolder>)EnumHolder,
                DefaultConstructor = static () => new global::TestNamespace.EnumHolder(),
                MethodBaseFactory = static () => typeof(global::TestNamespace.EnumHolder).GetConstructor(__BindingFlags_Instance_All, null, global::System.Type.EmptyTypes, null),
                IsPublic = true,
            };
        }
    }
